document.title: L&T secures K9 Vajra follow-on order
document.main_text: The Ministry of Defence has placed a follow-on order with Larsen & Toubro for 100 additional K9 Vajra-T 155mm self-propelled howitzers, valued at about 4500 crore. Deliveries from L&T's Hazira complex.

signals.event_summary: L&T won ₹4,500 cr follow-on for 100 K9 Vajra self-propelled howitzers

document.title: Adani's JEET carbine placed L2 in Armed Forces programme
document.main_text: Adani Defence's IWI-derived JEET carbine was placed L2 on the Armed Forces close-quarter battle carbine programme, behind the DRDO-design winner on price and indigenous content.

signals.event_summary: Adani's foreign-derived JEET carbine placed L2, behind the indigenous DRDO-design winner

document.title: Armenia mounted-gun tender closing in days
document.main_text: Armenia's 155mm mounted-gun procurement is closing soon, with a bid window open for wheeled self-propelled howitzers worth an estimated 4000 crore.

signals.event_summary: Armenia mounted-gun tender closing in 9 days — 155mm SPH, ~₹4,000 cr bid window open

document.title: Rheinmetall demonstrates ramjet 155mm projectile at extended range
document.main_text: Rheinmetall demonstrated a ramjet-assisted 155mm artillery projectile reaching beyond 70 km in a recent test, signalling a step change in tube-artillery reach.

signals.event_summary: Rheinmetall demos ramjet 155mm projectile beyond 70 km in test

innovation.title: Ramjet-assisted 155mm projectile reaches 70+ km
innovation.description: Ramjet-assisted projectile extends 155mm reach well beyond conventional ERFB-BB.

document.title: RFP: 155mm 52-cal Mounted Gun System
document.main_text: Request for proposal for a truck-mounted 155mm/52 calibre gun system, 100 units, range not less than 45 km, system weight under 18 tonnes.

attachments.extracted_text: REQUEST FOR PROPOSAL. 155mm/52-cal mounted gun. Range >= 45 km. Weight < 18 tonnes. Quantity 100.

tenders.title: 155mm 52-cal Mounted Gun System
tenders.requirement_text: Truck-mounted 155mm/52 gun system, range >= 45 km, weight < 18 tonnes.

document.title: RFP: Close Quarter Battle Carbine
document.main_text: Request for proposal for a 5.56mm close quarter battle carbine, indigenous content preferred, effective range 200 m.

tenders.title: Close Quarter Battle Carbine (5.56mm)
tenders.requirement_text: 5.56mm CQB carbine, effective range 200 m, high indigenous content.

document.title: NIBE licenses Sig Sauer rifle production
document.main_text: NIBE Limited signed a technology licensing agreement with Sig Sauer to manufacture rifles in India, extending its small-arms portfolio through foreign IP.

signals.event_summary: NIBE licenses Sig Sauer rifle production — small-arms entry via foreign IP

partnerships.description: NIBE licensed Sig Sauer rifle production for the Indian market.

document.title: L&T deepens Hanwha tie for K9 export variants
document.main_text: L&T and Hanwha Aerospace extended their partnership to co-produce K9 export variants from Hazira, targeting Middle East artillery tenders.

partnerships.description: Extended K9 co-production for export variants.

document.title: Nigeria orders 18 CAESAR 6x6 howitzers
document.main_text: Nigeria contracted KNDS for 18 CAESAR 6x6 155mm wheeled howitzers worth an estimated $120M, expanding French artillery presence in West Africa.

signals.event_summary: Nigeria orders 18 KNDS CAESAR 6x6 howitzers (~$120M) — French artillery expands in West Africa

document.title: Adani-Elbit expand Drishti-10 production
document.main_text: Adani Defence expanded its Elbit partnership to scale Drishti-10 Starliner (Hermes 900) MALE UAV production in Hyderabad.

document.title: Solar Industries, EURENCO deepen propellant partnership
document.main_text: Solar Industries and EURENCO expanded their bi-modular charge system partnership for artillery ammunition under Make-in-India.

signals.event_summary: Solar deepens EURENCO propellant tie for 155mm bi-modular charge systems

partnerships.description: Bi-modular charge system and propellant co-development.

document.title: Rheinmetall fields next-gen active protection system
document.main_text: Rheinmetall announced an active protection system with multi-sensor hard-kill discrimination, entering low-rate production for armoured platforms.

signals.event_summary: Rheinmetall fields next-gen active protection system (hard-kill, multi-sensor)

innovation.title: Active protection system with multi-sensor hard-kill discrimination
innovation.description: Hard-kill APS with improved threat discrimination entering low-rate production.

document.title: India raises domestic defence procurement target
document.main_text: India set a record domestic defence procurement target with higher indigenous-content thresholds, favouring made-in-India artillery and ammunition.

signals.event_summary: India raises domestic procurement target with higher indigenous-content thresholds — tailwind for made-in-India artillery
